1099-misc:box1.label: Rents
1099-misc:box1.so: Tani waa wadarta lacagta kirada ee aad heshay sanadkan, tusaale ahaan haddii aad guri ama dhul kireysay.
1099-misc:box1.en: This is the total rent money you received this year, for example if you rented out a house or land.

1099-misc:box2.label: Royalties
1099-misc:box2.so: Tani waa lacag laga helay royalties, tusaale ahaan haddii la adeegsado hantidaada qoraallada, suugaanta, ama macdanta.
1099-misc:box2.en: This is royalty income, for example from copyrights, patents, or mineral rights.

1099-misc:box3.label: Other income
1099-misc:box3.so: Tani waa lacag kale oo aad heshay sanadkan oo aan ku habboonayn sanduuqyada kale ee foomkan.
1099-misc:box3.en: This is other money you received this year that doesn't fit the other boxes on this form.

1099-misc:box4.label: Federal income tax withheld
1099-misc:box4.so: Tani waa lacagta canshuurta federaalka ah ee horay laga jaray lacagtan, oo dawladda federaalka loo diray.
1099-misc:box4.en: This is the federal tax that was already taken out of this payment and sent to the government.

1099-misc:box6.label: Medical & health care payments
1099-misc:box6.so: Tani waa lacag laguu siiyay adoo bixiyay adeeg caafimaad.
1099-misc:box6.en: This is payment you received for providing medical or health care services.

1099-misc:box8.label: Substitute payments
1099-misc:box8.so: Tani waa lacag laguu siiyay halkii saamilaha ama ribada, badanaa la xidhiidha amaahinta saamiga.
1099-misc:box8.en: This is a payment made to you in place of dividends or interest, usually related to securities lending.

1099-misc:box10.label: Gross proceeds to an attorney
1099-misc:box10.so: Tani waa wadarta lacagta loo bixiyay qareen, oo aysan ahayn agaasimahaaga lacagta.
1099-misc:box10.en: This is the total amount paid to an attorney, not necessarily your own legal fees.

1099-misc:box16.label: State tax withheld
1099-misc:box16.so: Tani waa canshuurta stateka ee horay laga jaray lacagtan.
1099-misc:box16.en: This is any state tax that was already withheld from this payment.

1099-misc:box17.label: State & payer's state number
1099-misc:box17.so: Tani waa stateka iyo lambarka diiwaangashan ee shirkadda kuu bixisay lacagta.
1099-misc:box17.en: This is the state and the payer's state-registered ID number.

1099-misc:box18.label: State income
1099-misc:box18.so: Tani waa qaybta dakhligaaga ee stateku canshuuro.
1099-misc:box18.en: This is the portion of your income the state taxes.
